name: IAM Password Policy Prevents Reuse
description: IAM password policy should prevent password reuse by remembering at least 24 previous passwords
remediation: Update the IAM password policy to prevent reuse of at least 24 previous passwords. Use: aws iam update-account-password-policy --password-reuse-prevention 24
remediation_steps: Navigate to IAM in AWS Console
Select 'Account settings' from the left menu
Set 'Number of passwords to remember' to 24
